# Roji Peptides

> Research-grade peptide stacks for laboratory use. US-based, third-party tested, COA-verified.

## Products

- [Wolverine Stack (BPC-157 + TB-500)](https://rojipeptides.com/product/wolverine-stack/): Tissue repair research stack
- [Recomp Stack (CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin)](https://rojipeptides.com/product/recomp-stack/): Growth hormone axis research stack
- [Full Protocol](https://rojipeptides.com/product/full-protocol/): Complete research protocol combining healing + GH-axis peptides
- [Research Supplies Kit](https://rojipeptides.com/product/research-supplies-kit/): BAC water, syringes, and swabs bundle

## Research Resources

- [Research Library Index](https://rojipeptides.com/research/): Compound + combination profiles (24 compounds, 16 pairings) with chemistry, half-life, mechanism, and PubMed citations
- [BPC-157](https://rojipeptides.com/research/bpc-157/): Pentadecapeptide research profile
- [TB-500](https://rojipeptides.com/research/tb-500/): Thymosin β-4 fragment research profile
- [CJC-1295](https://rojipeptides.com/research/cjc-1295/): GHRH analog research profile
- [Ipamorelin](https://rojipeptides.com/research/ipamorelin/): Selective GHS-R1a agonist research profile
- [MK-677](https://rojipeptides.com/research/mk-677/): Oral ghrelin agonist research profile
- [Tirzepatide](https://rojipeptides.com/research/tirzepatide/): Dual GIP/GLP-1 agonist research profile
- [Retatrutide](https://rojipeptides.com/research/retatrutide/): Triple GIP/GLP-1/Glucagon agonist research profile
- [BPC-157 + TB-500](https://rojipeptides.com/research/bpc-157-and-tb-500/): Tissue-repair research pairing
- [CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin + MK-677](https://rojipeptides.com/research/cjc-1295-and-ipamorelin-and-mk-677/): GH-axis research stack
- [Certificate of Analysis Library](https://rojipeptides.com/coa/): Third-party COAs for all products
- [FAQ](https://rojipeptides.com/faq/): Frequently asked questions about peptide research

## Free Research Tools

- [Peptide Research Tools](https://tools.rojipeptides.com): Reconstitution calculator, half-life database, COA analyzer, cost-per-dose calculator, body recomp calculator, supplement interaction checker, PubMed search
- [MCP Server](https://mcp.rojipeptides.com/mcp): Use these tools programmatically via the Model Context Protocol (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor)

## About

- [About Roji](https://rojipeptides.com/about/)

For research and laboratory use only.
